message:
论文晨报｜微电子材料 / 晶体管（2026-06-16）
Sources: arXiv / Science Advances / Nature Electronics / Nature Materials / IEEE EDL / PRL
命中 4 篇；Intel/TSMC 重点 0 篇
1. [arXiv] Electrostatic Charge Model for Dual-Layer Oxide Thin-Film Transistors
   关键词：transistor
   日期：2026-06-12
   Authors: Måns J. Mattsson, John F. Wager, Matt W. Graham
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13765v1
2. [arXiv] Modifying Electrochemical Doping in Light-Emitting Electrochemical Cells with Gold Nanopart…
   日期：2026-06-12
   Authors: Ajay K. Poonia, Anton Kirch, Joan Ràfols-Ribé 等
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14402v1
3. [arXiv] Vapor-to-glass preparation of biaxially aligned organic semiconductors
   关键词：semiconductor
   日期：2026-06-12
   Authors: Jianzhu Ju, Debaditya Chatterjee, Paul M. Voyles 等
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14213v1
4. [arXiv] Molecular Beam Epitaxy of Mn2In2Se5 van der Waals Layers Using Mn Intercalation
   关键词：epitaxy
   日期：2026-06-12
   Authors: Qihua Zhang, Ke Wang, Wesley Auker 等
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.13906v1

papers.title: Electrostatic Charge Model for Dual-Layer Oxide Thin-Film Transistors
papers.summary: A simple electrostatic two-equation model for dual-layer thin-film transistor (TFT) operation is developed. The model distributes electrostatic charge between the top and bottom semiconductor layers, and the resulting transfer and mobility curves accurately simulate experimental dual-layer a-IGZO/a-IZO TFT operation. The model further provides an analytic expression that maps charge confinement in the high-mobility a-IZO bottom semiconductor layer with the a-IGZO top-layer thickness and the conduction-band offset. By considering both a-IGZO/a-IZO layer charge partition and competing thickness-dependent oxygen vacancy trap density effects, the model suggests an optimal a-IGZO layer thickness of 9 to 12 nm. Importantly, this general electrostatic model extends to most dual-layer TFT systems and calculates how the top semiconductor layer TFT turn-on voltage changes sharply with the conduction band offset and layer thickness.
papers.abstract_cn: 本文建立了一种用于双层薄膜晶体管（thin-film transistor, TFT）工作的简单静电双方程模型。该模型将静电电荷分配在顶部和底部半导体层之间，所得转移曲线和迁移率曲线能够准确模拟实验中的双层 a-IGZO/a-IZO TFT 工作特性。该模型进一步给出了一个解析表达式，用于描述高迁移率 a-IZO 底部半导体层中的电荷限域如何随 a-IGZO 顶层厚度和导带偏移而变化。通过同时考虑 a-IGZO/a-IZO 层间电荷分配以及相互竞争的厚度依赖氧空位陷阱密度效应，该模型表明最优 a-IGZO 层厚度为 9 至 12 nm。重要的是，这一通用静电模型可扩展到大多数双层 TFT 体系，并可计算顶部半导体层 TFT 开启电压如何随导带偏移和层厚发生急剧变化。
papers.abstract_zh: 本文建立了一种用于双层薄膜晶体管（thin-film transistor, TFT）工作的简单静电双方程模型。该模型将静电电荷分配在顶部和底部半导体层之间，所得转移曲线和迁移率曲线能够准确模拟实验中的双层 a-IGZO/a-IZO TFT 工作特性。该模型进一步给出了一个解析表达式，用于描述高迁移率 a-IZO 底部半导体层中的电荷限域如何随 a-IGZO 顶层厚度和导带偏移而变化。通过同时考虑 a-IGZO/a-IZO 层间电荷分配以及相互竞争的厚度依赖氧空位陷阱密度效应，该模型表明最优 a-IGZO 层厚度为 9 至 12 nm。重要的是，这一通用静电模型可扩展到大多数双层 TFT 体系，并可计算顶部半导体层 TFT 开启电压如何随导带偏移和层厚发生急剧变化。

papers.title: Electrical Spectroscopy of Intervalley Relaxation in WSe$_2$ Transistors
papers.summary: We show that the transconductance of multilayer WSe$_2$ field-effect transistors serves as a direct electrical spectrometer of the intervalley relaxation time $τ_{\rm iv}$, previously accessible only by ultrafast optical techniques. Extending an equilibrium valley-thermodynamics framework with a single relaxation equation for the $Γ$-valley carrier fraction $f_Γ(t)$, we predict three signatures: (i)~a Lorentzian transconductance $g_m(ω)=g_{m,0}+g_{m,v}^0/(1+iωτ_{\rm iv})$, whose imaginary part peaks at $ω_c=τ_{\rm iv}^{-1}$ with opposite signs for bilayer and trilayer; (ii)~a two-stage current transient after a gate step, exhibiting bilayer overshoot or trilayer undershoot; and (iii)~sweep-rate-proportional hysteresis whose gate-voltage profile and layer-number sign reversal distinguish valley from trap-induced dynamics. All three signatures provide quantitative electrical access to $τ_{\rm iv}$ with standard rf and dc instrumentation.
papers.abstract_cn: 我们表明，多层 WSe2 场效应晶体管的跨导可作为谷间弛豫时间 τiv 的直接电学谱仪，而此前 τiv 只能通过超快光学技术获得。我们在平衡谷热力学框架中引入针对 Γ 谷载流子分数 fΓ(t) 的单一弛豫方程，并预测了三个特征：（i）洛伦兹型跨导 gm(ω)=gm,0+gm,v^0/(1+iωτiv)，其虚部在 ωc=τiv^-1 处达到峰值，并且在双层和三层中符号相反；（ii）栅压阶跃后的两阶段电流瞬态，表现为双层过冲或三层欠冲；以及（iii）与扫描速率成正比的滞回，其栅电压轮廓和层数相关的符号反转可将谷动力学与陷阱诱导动力学区分开来。这三个特征均可通过标准射频和直流仪器对 τiv 进行定量电学访问。
papers.abstract_zh: 我们表明，多层 WSe2 场效应晶体管的跨导可作为谷间弛豫时间 τiv 的直接电学谱仪，而此前 τiv 只能通过超快光学技术获得。我们在平衡谷热力学框架中引入针对 Γ 谷载流子分数 fΓ(t) 的单一弛豫方程，并预测了三个特征：（i）洛伦兹型跨导 gm(ω)=gm,0+gm,v^0/(1+iωτiv)，其虚部在 ωc=τiv^-1 处达到峰值，并且在双层和三层中符号相反；（ii）栅压阶跃后的两阶段电流瞬态，表现为双层过冲或三层欠冲；以及（iii）与扫描速率成正比的滞回，其栅电压轮廓和层数相关的符号反转可将谷动力学与陷阱诱导动力学区分开来。这三个特征均可通过标准射频和直流仪器对 τiv 进行定量电学访问。

papers.title: Compositional gradient engineering for enhanced ferroelectricity in ultrathin AlScN
papers.summary: Ferroelectric AlScN is promising for CMOS-compatible non-volatile memory, but thickness scaling is limited by leakage, premature breakdown, and defect-mediated failure. Here we show that compositional grading within a continuous wurtzite AlN-AlScN lattice mitigates these limitations by distributing structural and polarization discontinuities across the film thickness, reducing defect formation and local field concentration. In a 20 nm graded heterostructure, monotonic Sc incorporation and AlN-rich boundaries produce reversible ferroelectric switching, an as-grown metal-polar state, a 21% higher breakdown field, 10% enhanced remanent polarization, and 40x higher resistivity relative to homogeneous AlScN. Time-domain PUND measurements reveal strongly suppressed post-switching leakage, consistent with reduced defect-assisted and polarization-coupled conduction. This improved dielectric robustness enables ferroelectric functionality in 5 nm graded stacks containing only a 2 nm $\mathrm{Al}_{0.64}\mathrm{Sc}_{0.36}\mathrm{N}$ region, with measurable switching near 1 V. These results establish compositional grading as a defect- and field-management strategy for scalable ultrathin wurtzite ferroelectrics.
papers.abstract_cn: 铁电 AlScN 有望用于 CMOS 兼容的非易失性存储器，但其厚度缩放受到漏电、过早击穿以及缺陷介导失效的限制。本文表明，在连续纤锌矿 AlN-AlScN 晶格中引入组分梯度，可通过在薄膜厚度方向上分散结构和极化不连续性来缓解这些限制，从而减少缺陷形成和局域电场集中。在 20 nm 梯度异质结构中，单调 Sc 引入和富 AlN 边界相对于均匀 AlScN 产生了可逆铁电翻转、生长态金属极性状态、提高 21% 的击穿场、增强 10% 的剩余极化以及提高 40 倍的电阻率。时域 PUND 测量显示翻转后漏电受到强烈抑制，这与缺陷辅助传导和极化耦合传导的降低一致。这种改善的介电稳健性使仅含 2 nm Al0.64Sc0.36N 区域的 5 nm 梯度堆叠也具备铁电功能，并在约 1 V 附近实现可测量的翻转。这些结果确立了组分梯度作为一种缺陷和电场管理策略，可用于可缩放超薄纤锌矿铁电体。
papers.abstract_zh: 铁电 AlScN 有望用于 CMOS 兼容的非易失性存储器，但其厚度缩放受到漏电、过早击穿以及缺陷介导失效的限制。本文表明，在连续纤锌矿 AlN-AlScN 晶格中引入组分梯度，可通过在薄膜厚度方向上分散结构和极化不连续性来缓解这些限制，从而减少缺陷形成和局域电场集中。在 20 nm 梯度异质结构中，单调 Sc 引入和富 AlN 边界相对于均匀 AlScN 产生了可逆铁电翻转、生长态金属极性状态、提高 21% 的击穿场、增强 10% 的剩余极化以及提高 40 倍的电阻率。时域 PUND 测量显示翻转后漏电受到强烈抑制，这与缺陷辅助传导和极化耦合传导的降低一致。这种改善的介电稳健性使仅含 2 nm Al0.64Sc0.36N 区域的 5 nm 梯度堆叠也具备铁电功能，并在约 1 V 附近实现可测量的翻转。这些结果确立了组分梯度作为一种缺陷和电场管理策略，可用于可缩放超薄纤锌矿铁电体。

papers.title: Boron Co-Alloying in AlScN Wurtzite Ferroelectrics: Insights from an 850-Sample Combinatorial Study
papers.summary: AlScN wurtzite ferroelectrics are promising candidates for energy-efficient non-volatile memory. However, AlScN suffers from a high coercive field and reduced cycling endurance, and the limited tunability of its properties constrains further optimization. Co-doping AlScN with boron offers the promise of independently tailoring the chemical and structural properties, making AlScBN an attractive quaternary system. This material has already been explored for a few selected compositions, however, no systematic study of the full AlScBN compositional space exists. A combinatorial approach consisting of gradient deposition with HiPIMS at low temperatures of 250°C and automatic analysis of film properties allowed us to analyze a total of 850 unique samples within the AlScBN phase space. In addition to a full screening of the materials' chemical and structural properties, we fabricate and characterize combinatorial device libraries. XPS charge transfer analysis experimentally confirms that bond ionicity correlates with a reduction in the coercive field for AlScN and AlScBN systems, opposite trends are instead observed for AlBN. While the films maintain a high remanent polarization of 130-150 μC/cm2, Sc and B co-doping reduces the coercive field from 7 MV/cm to 3 MV/cm. Notably, B co-alloying lowers the amount of Sc needed to lower the coercive field, reducing reliance on this scarce element. In addition, we find that co-alloying with B, notably improves cycling endurance, which is related to a reduction in defect density. These results establish AlScBN as a scalable, CMOS-compatible ferroelectric, positioning it as an interesting alternative to AlScN.
papers.abstract_cn: AlScN 纤锌矿铁电体是能效型非易失性存储器的有前景候选材料。然而，AlScN 存在矫顽场高和循环耐久性降低的问题，并且其性质可调范围有限，制约了进一步优化。用硼对 AlScN 进行共掺杂有望独立调控化学和结构性质，使 AlScBN 成为一种有吸引力的四元体系。该材料此前已在少数选定组分上得到探索，但尚不存在对完整 AlScBN 组分空间的系统研究。我们采用一种组合方法，包括在 250°C 低温下通过高功率脉冲磁控溅射（HiPIMS）进行梯度沉积以及对薄膜性质进行自动分析，从而能够在 AlScBN 相空间内分析总计 850 个独特样品。除对材料化学和结构性质进行全面筛选外，我们还制备并表征了组合器件库。XPS 电荷转移分析从实验上证实，在 AlScN 和 AlScBN 体系中，键离子性与矫顽场降低相关；而对于 AlBN，则观察到相反趋势。在薄膜保持 130–150 μC/cm2 高剩余极化的同时，Sc 和 B 共掺杂将矫顽场从 7 MV/cm 降低到 3 MV/cm。值得注意的是，B 共合金化降低了为降低矫顽场所需的 Sc 含量，从而减少了对这种稀缺元素的依赖。此外，我们发现与 B 共合金化显著改善了循环耐久性，这与缺陷密度降低有关。这些结果确立了 AlScBN 作为一种可扩展、CMOS 兼容铁电体的地位，使其成为 AlScN 的一个有吸引力替代方案。
papers.abstract_zh: AlScN 纤锌矿铁电体是能效型非易失性存储器的有前景候选材料。然而，AlScN 存在矫顽场高和循环耐久性降低的问题，并且其性质可调范围有限，制约了进一步优化。用硼对 AlScN 进行共掺杂有望独立调控化学和结构性质，使 AlScBN 成为一种有吸引力的四元体系。该材料此前已在少数选定组分上得到探索，但尚不存在对完整 AlScBN 组分空间的系统研究。我们采用一种组合方法，包括在 250°C 低温下通过高功率脉冲磁控溅射（HiPIMS）进行梯度沉积以及对薄膜性质进行自动分析，从而能够在 AlScBN 相空间内分析总计 850 个独特样品。除对材料化学和结构性质进行全面筛选外，我们还制备并表征了组合器件库。XPS 电荷转移分析从实验上证实，在 AlScN 和 AlScBN 体系中，键离子性与矫顽场降低相关；而对于 AlBN，则观察到相反趋势。在薄膜保持 130–150 μC/cm2 高剩余极化的同时，Sc 和 B 共掺杂将矫顽场从 7 MV/cm 降低到 3 MV/cm。值得注意的是，B 共合金化降低了为降低矫顽场所需的 Sc 含量，从而减少了对这种稀缺元素的依赖。此外，我们发现与 B 共合金化显著改善了循环耐久性，这与缺陷密度降低有关。这些结果确立了 AlScBN 作为一种可扩展、CMOS 兼容铁电体的地位，使其成为 AlScN 的一个有吸引力替代方案。

papers.title: Modifying Electrochemical Doping in Light-Emitting Electrochemical Cells with Gold Nanoparticles
papers.summary: Electrochemical doping offers dynamic control of the electronic properties of organic semiconductors, and it is the enabling feature of a range of technologies, including electrochemical transistors, energy-storage devices, light-emitting electrochemical cells (LECs), and bioelectronics. Electrochemical doping is commonly controlled by the selection of the constituents in the active material of the device or the applied voltage bias, but herein we report that the incorporation of Au nanoparticles (Au-NPs) at an electrode interface can constitute an alternative control parameter. The LEC features balanced p- and n-type electrochemical doping that forms a p-n junction doping structure in its active material, and we find that it is possible to reshape this doping profile by incorporating Au-NPs at an electrode interface. Specifically, we establish that the inclusion of neat non-capped Au-NPs at the anodic interface shifts the p-n junction (i.e., the emission zone) away from the anode. In contrast, the inclusion of Au-NPs capped with sodium citrate is found to reverse this behavior, so that the emission zone is instead moved towards the anode. We utilize this control parameter to shift the emission zone towards a position of constructive (destructive) interference, as manifested in a strong increase (decrease) of the LEC emission efficiency. Our findings establish an interfacial strategy for modulating the spatial profile of electrochemical doping and tuning device performance without altering the chemistry of the active material, relying instead on the surface modification of one electrode. This approach is important because it provides a versatile and minimally invasive route to optimize electrochemical devices while preserving the intrinsic properties and formulation of the active material.
papers.abstract_cn: 电化学掺杂能够动态控制有机半导体的电子性质，并且是包括电化学晶体管、储能器件、发光电化学池（light-emitting electrochemical cells, LECs）和生物电子学在内一系列技术的使能特征。电化学掺杂通常通过选择器件有源材料中的组成成分或施加电压偏置来控制，但本文报道，在电极界面引入 Au 纳米颗粒（Au-NPs）可以构成另一种控制参数。LEC 具有平衡的 p 型和 n 型电化学掺杂，并在其有源材料中形成 p-n 结掺杂结构；我们发现，通过在电极界面引入 Au-NPs，可以重塑这一掺杂轮廓。具体而言，我们确定，在阳极界面引入纯净的未封端 Au-NPs 会使 p-n 结（即发光区）远离阳极。相反，引入由柠檬酸钠封端的 Au-NPs 则会反转这种行为，使发光区转而向阳极移动。我们利用这一控制参数将发光区移动到发生相长（相消）干涉的位置，其表现为 LEC 发光效率显著提高（降低）。我们的发现建立了一种界面策略，可在不改变有源材料化学组成的情况下调控电化学掺杂的空间轮廓并调节器件性能，而是依赖于一个电极的表面改性。这种方法很重要，因为它提供了一条通用且微创的路径来优化电化学器件，同时保持有源材料的内禀性质和配方。
papers.abstract_zh: 电化学掺杂能够动态控制有机半导体的电子性质，并且是包括电化学晶体管、储能器件、发光电化学池（light-emitting electrochemical cells, LECs）和生物电子学在内一系列技术的使能特征。电化学掺杂通常通过选择器件有源材料中的组成成分或施加电压偏置来控制，但本文报道，在电极界面引入 Au 纳米颗粒（Au-NPs）可以构成另一种控制参数。LEC 具有平衡的 p 型和 n 型电化学掺杂，并在其有源材料中形成 p-n 结掺杂结构；我们发现，通过在电极界面引入 Au-NPs，可以重塑这一掺杂轮廓。具体而言，我们确定，在阳极界面引入纯净的未封端 Au-NPs 会使 p-n 结（即发光区）远离阳极。相反，引入由柠檬酸钠封端的 Au-NPs 则会反转这种行为，使发光区转而向阳极移动。我们利用这一控制参数将发光区移动到发生相长（相消）干涉的位置，其表现为 LEC 发光效率显著提高（降低）。我们的发现建立了一种界面策略，可在不改变有源材料化学组成的情况下调控电化学掺杂的空间轮廓并调节器件性能，而是依赖于一个电极的表面改性。这种方法很重要，因为它提供了一条通用且微创的路径来优化电化学器件，同时保持有源材料的内禀性质和配方。

papers.title: Stable, bidirectional electro-optic transduction in thin film lithium tantalate
papers.summary: Efficient and stable microwave-optical transduction is a key enabling technology for distributed superconducting quantum computing and heterogeneous quantum networks. Electro-optic transducers based on thin-film lithium niobate (TFLN) have shown strong promise, but demonstrations to date have been limited by various factors such as low frequency bias drift, low efficiency, fabrication complexity, and scalability. Here we demonstrate the first integrated electro-optic microwave-optical transducers realized in thin-film lithium tantalate (TFLT), a material platform offering Pockels nonlinearity comparable to TFLN together with improved bias stability and high-power handling. We fabricate superconducting microwave resonators coupled to tunable photonic-molecule optical resonators using wafer-scale deep ultraviolet lithography, offering high-throughput production of hundreds of devices per wafer. Across six devices we observe coherent bidirectional conversion between C-band optical photons and 4.9-5.5 GHz microwave photons, with measured on-chip efficiencies and inferred single-photon coupling rates g_0/2π ~ 1 kHz consistent with theory. Continuous operation over multiple days is achieved using a static bias field with minimal feedback, demonstrating a major operational advantage. We further characterize optical loss statistics, microwave resonator performance, and optically induced added noise under pulsed pumping, finding less than one added photon for 100 microsecond pulses at the highest measured efficiencies. These results establish TFLT as a scalable and robust electro-optic platform for future quantum interconnects and modular quantum processors.
papers.abstract_cn: 高效且稳定的微波—光学转换是分布式超导量子计算和异构量子网络的一项关键使能技术。基于薄膜铌酸锂（thin-film lithium niobate, TFLN）的电光换能器已显示出很强前景，但迄今的演示仍受到低频偏置漂移、效率较低、制造复杂性和可扩展性等多种因素限制。本文展示了首个在薄膜钽酸锂（thin-film lithium tantalate, TFLT）中实现的集成电光微波—光学换能器；这一材料平台具有与 TFLN 相当的 Pockels 非线性，同时具备更好的偏置稳定性和高功率承受能力。我们利用晶圆级深紫外光刻制备了与可调光子分子光学谐振器耦合的超导微波谐振器，可实现每片晶圆数百个器件的高通量生产。在六个器件中，我们观察到 C 波段光学光子与 4.9–5.5 GHz 微波光子之间的相干双向转换；测得的片上效率以及推断的单光子耦合率 g0/2π ~ 1 kHz 与理论一致。通过使用静态偏置场并结合最小反馈，实现了持续多天的连续工作，展示出一项重要的运行优势。我们进一步表征了光学损耗统计、微波谐振器性能，以及脉冲泵浦下光诱导的附加噪声，发现在最高测得效率下，100 微秒脉冲对应的附加光子数小于 1。这些结果确立了 TFLT 作为一种可扩展且稳健的电光平台，可用于未来量子互连和模块化量子处理器。

What to check: 性能提升、效率/耦合表现、可靠性与稳定性.
Context: Stable, bidirectional electro-optic transduction in thin film lithium tantalate.

papers.title: Robust Spin Logic Enabled by Generalized $\mathrm{SU}(2)$ Symmetry in $p$-Wave Magnets
papers.summary: Unconventional magnets combine the vanishing stray fields of antiferromagnets with the strong spin-splitting of ferromagnets, offering a unique material platform for spintronics. However, a critical challenge in realizing functional spin-logic devices lies in preserving long-range spin coherence against momentum-degrading scattering and gate-induced dephasing. Here, we demonstrate that the intrinsic momentum-dependent exchange field of a three-dimensional $p$-wave magnet can be precisely tuned against gate-induced Rashba spin-orbit coupling to establish a \textit{generalized} $\mathrm{SU}(2)$ spin-rotation symmetry. This emergent conservation law generates a symmetry-protected Persistent Spin Helix (PSH), effectively integrating the high energy scales of 3D bulk magnetic exchange with the macroscopic coherence of symmetry protection. By modeling a synergistic $p$-wave magnetic spin field-effect transistor (spin-FET), we reveal high-visibility Datta-Das conductance oscillations controlled purely by electrical gating. Crucially, our quantum transport simulations confirm that this symmetry-engineered transport regime exhibits exceptional resilience against strong non-magnetic Anderson disorder and geometric variations. These results establish a synergistic paradigm for non-magnetized spintronics, demonstrating how the active integration of spin-orbit coupling and unconventional magnetism can yield disorder-resilient spintronic logic.
papers.abstract_cn: 非常规磁体结合了反铁磁体的零杂散场和铁磁体的强自旋劈裂，为自旋电子学提供了一个独特的材料平台。然而，实现功能性自旋逻辑器件的一项关键挑战在于，如何在动量退相干散射和栅诱导退相干下保持长程自旋相干。本文证明，三维 p 波磁体的本征动量依赖交换场可以与栅诱导 Rashba 自旋—轨道耦合进行精确调谐，从而建立一种广义 SU(2) 自旋旋转对称性。这一涌现的守恒律产生了受对称性保护的持久自旋螺旋（Persistent Spin Helix, PSH），有效地将三维体磁交换的高能量尺度与对称性保护带来的宏观相干性集成在一起。通过建模一种协同型 p 波磁性自旋场效应晶体管（spin-FET），我们揭示了完全由电栅控制的高可见度 Datta-Das 电导振荡。关键的是，我们的量子输运仿真证实，这种经对称性工程设计的输运区域对强非磁性 Anderson 无序和几何变化表现出优异的抗扰性。这些结果确立了一种面向无净磁化自旋电子学的协同范式，展示了主动集成自旋—轨道耦合与非常规磁性如何产生抗无序的自旋电子逻辑。

papers.title: Optical-like interference control polar-phonons dispersions in 2D materials
papers.summary: It has been argued that the polar phonon modes of two-dimensional (2D) materials should show a linear dependence close to the Brillouin zone center due to the reduced problem dimensionality compared to a three-dimensional crystal, leading to a vanishing LO-TO splitting. Revisiting this question using a mirror-charge framework derived from classical electrostatics, we show that it is not always true: with perfectly-reflective dielectric interfaces, it is possible to recover a LO-TO splitting, or an equivalent phenomenon for the out-of-plane modes. Effectively, the dispersion of polar phonon modes is governed by optical-like constructive and destructive interferences of the source potential with its reflection at the dielectric interfaces. This work highlights the critical role of dielectric boundary conditions to understand phonon-related properties in 2D materials.
papers.abstract_cn: 已有观点认为，由于相较于三维晶体问题维度降低，二维（2D）材料的极性声子模式在布里渊区中心附近应表现出线性依赖，从而导致 LO-TO 劈裂消失。本文利用源自经典静电学的镜像电荷框架重新审视这一问题，并表明这种说法并不总是成立：在完全反射的介电界面条件下，可以恢复 LO-TO 劈裂，或者对面外模式产生等效现象。实际上，极性声子模式的色散由源势与其在介电界面处反射之间类似光学的相长和相消干涉所支配。本工作强调了介电边界条件在理解二维材料中声子相关性质时的关键作用。

Focus: 二维材料.
What to check: 器件性能、实验结果和潜在应用价值.
Context: Optical-like interference control polar-phonons dispersions in 2D materials.
